---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve the plugin
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behaviour

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment

| Detail | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Plugin version | e.g. 1.0.0 |
| WordPress version | e.g. 6.4.2 |
| WooCommerce version | e.g. 8.3.0 |
| PHP version | e.g. 8.1.0 |
| Active theme | e.g. Storefront |
| Browser (if relevant) | e.g. Chrome 120 |

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here (error messages, debug logs, etc.).
